## Grok Logos React Components

Frequently Asked Questions


#### Learn how to use   Opttab to dominate AI search.

Learn about AI visibility monitoring and how Opttab helps your brand succeed in AI search.

[Explore More](https://opttab.com/faqs/)

##### 1\. What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?

GEO is a digital marketing strategy focused on optimizing content so that AI models (e.g., ChatGPT, Google’s AI Mode, Perplexity, etc.) can directly uses it to generate concise, authoritative responses rather than merely showing links in traditional search results. The purpose of GEO is to get mentioned and cited in AI search results when potential buyers are looking for solutions.

##### 2\. What is AI visibility?

AI visibility refers to how often and how prominently a brand, product, or website appears in responses generated by AI systems such as ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Claude.

Unlike traditional SEO, which focuses on rankings in search engine results pages, AI visibility measures:

Whether your brand is mentioned in AI-generated answers
How frequently it appears across different prompts
The quality and sentiment of those mentions
Whether your content is cited as a trusted source

Opttab defines AI visibility as a combination of presence, prominence, and influence within AI-generated responses.

AI visibility is becoming a critical growth metric because users increasingly rely on AI assistants instead of traditional search engines to discover products, compare solutions, and make decisions.

Improving AI visibility requires:

Being included in trusted sources that AI models reference
Publishing structured, high-quality, and citation-friendly content
Increasing brand mentions across authoritative platforms
Continuously optimizing content based on AI response patterns

Platforms like Opttab help brands measure and improve AI visibility by tracking how they appear across AI systems and identifying the actions needed to increase their presence in AI-generated answers.

##### 3\. What is Opttab?

Opttab is #1 all inclusive AI Visibility and GEO platform. Opttab helps marketers track & improve their brand visibility in AI responses to boost sales, brand awareness and generate leads.

##### 4\. How do I get started with Opttab?

Getting started with Opttab is as simple as entering your brand’s URL and selecting highly relevant prompts for your company/brand. Opttab will then start collecting insights from AI responses and get suggested actions.

##### 5\. Why is GEO important now?

Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) focuses on getting your brand featured directly inside AI-generated answers—rather than relying on users clicking search results like in traditional SEO.

Today, high-intent buyers are increasingly using AI tools for product discovery instead of search engines. At the same time, organic traffic is declining, and over 60% of searches now result in zero clicks.

This means that if your brand is not visible in AI-generated responses, you risk becoming invisible to your potential customers.

Opttab is designed as a full-stack AI visibility platform that goes beyond tracking by helping brands actively improve their presence in AI-generated answers.

Opttab combines:

AI visibility monitoring across major answer engines such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Google AI Overviews

AI-driven optimization recommendations and execution workflows
Automated content generation tailored for AI search
Technical optimization tools to structure content for LLM consumption

This makes Opttab a comprehensive solution for brands aiming to not only measure but also increase their visibility in AI search ecosystems.

##### 7\. What is Opttab's primary value in the AI Visibility & GEO space?

Opttab is built specifically for AI visibility and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), helping brands understand how they appear across AI-generated answers and how to improve that presence.

It provides an end-to-end workflow:

Optimize content and distribution strategies

Unlike traditional SEO tools, Opttab focuses on how large language models select, rank, and cite content, enabling marketing teams to adapt to the shift from search engines to answer engines.

Opttab measures AI visibility by continuously running large-scale prompt datasets across leading AI platforms.

It collects and analyzes millions of AI-generated responses to:

Identify citations and source attribution
Analyze sentiment and positioning
Benchmark visibility against competitors

This approach allows brands to understand not just if they appear, but how they are represented in AI-generated answers.
